# Allowed hosts referenced by mirrored assets.
# Add one host per line, comments start with #.

# Primary app origin
tweaktrak.ibiza.dev
www.tweaktrak.ibiza.dev

# Common first-party/static endpoints
ibiza.dev
www.ibiza.dev

# Common web app/static dependencies (keep minimal and review additions)
cdn.jsdelivr.net
unpkg.com
cdnjs.cloudflare.com
fonts.googleapis.com
fonts.gstatic.com

# Project homepages / docs URLs that appear as string literals inside
# inlined vendor bundles (not network endpoints — the wrapper's CSP +
# kill-switch still hard-block any actual fetch). Required since
# fetch-site.sh inlines external scripts/styles into index.html, which
# makes any URL embedded in the upstream source visible to domains_check.
alpinejs.dev

# W3C namespace URIs (used as xmlns in inline SVG/XML, not network endpoints)
www.w3.org
